resolution: Both figures are correct CONVERGENT-family counts; they are temporal snapshots of the same monotonic running total. 325,686 = end-of-T2B-RESONANCE-B67 (2026-04-29) snapshot; 584,966 ~= 585,000 = end-of-T2B-RESONANCE-B8-12 (2026-04-30) snapshot. T2A-CMAX2-RATIO (108,762 / 124,334 / 125,000) is degree-(4,2) and is NOT in the T2B empirical base. One additive-overcount of ~7,174 (~1.2%) is present in the manuscript: the b1=+/-4,+/-5 resonance sweep (Exp C) re-classifies a subset of the F(2,5) D=5 enumeration (Exp B), giving a de-duplicated total of ~577,792 rather than 584,966. Phantom-hit rule (L != 0) verified applied across all enumeration sessions: 0 phantoms in final T2B tallies; 38 phantoms detected and rejected in T2A.
